# F034 Operator-Initialized Transition Head

## Decision
`F034_OPERATOR_INITIALIZED_RESIDUAL_DISCARDED_HELDOUT_BELOW_FLOOR`

## Purpose
F033 was safe only by selecting zero residual. F034 changes the transition architecture: the predictor is initialized exactly to the train-only same-representation ridge floor, with a zero-initialized action-conditioned residual head trained on frozen train latents. This tests whether the JEPA residual can improve from a floor-preserving starting point rather than being added after a weaker direct head.

## Selection Rule
```json
{
  "scale_grid": [
    0.0,
    0.025,
    0.05,
    0.1,
    0.15,
    0.2,
    0.25,
    0.5,
    0.75,
    1.0
  ],
  "train_delta_margin": 0.001,
  "train_recall_margin": 0.0,
  "train_transition_margin": 0.001
}
```

- selected floor gap recall: `0.029630` (min `-0.037037`)
- RNA->image recall@1: `0.755556`
- image->RNA recall@1: `0.829630`

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. A safe nonzero result can justify Tier 3 design; a zero fallback or held-out local-floor violation triggers another Debate Council.
